snippet.title: MOST COMPLIMENTED PERFUMES EVER🔥
snippet.description:
In this video I’m sharing my most complimented fragrances ever 😍 I get a compliment every time I wear these, they’re so good! 

✨ If you enjoyed the video, don’t forget to like, subscribe, and tap the 🔔 for more fragrance and beauty videos every week!

📦💖 Want to Send Me Something? 📦💖
Address: PO Box 41763 Bakersfield, CA 93384

My Mercari: https://www.mercari.com/u/pcr001/?sv=0 

⭐ Products mentioned:
• Parfums De Marly Delina 
• La Vie Est Belle Soleil Cristal 
• Valentino Donna Born In Roma
• YSL Mon Paris 
• Zara Red Temptation 
• Dossier Ambery Saffron
• Eilish by Billie Eilish

💄 Makeup I’m Wearing: 
• Foundation: IT Cosmetics CC+ Cream Natural Full Coverage Foundation - https://amzn.to/4pNcXwD 
• Concealer: Tarte Shape Tape - https://amzn.to/4oXh6xR 
• Eyeshadow: Light Brown Shadow + Unleashia Glitterpedia Palette - https://amzn.to/3OaBTRm  
• Lips: Colourpop Lip Liner shade Beeper & Fenty Gloss Bomb Shimmer Stix shade How Many Carats?!

🎥 Film Equipment: 
• Camera: Sony Alpha ZV-E10 II - https://amzn.to/3XaXA4L 
• Lights: Skytex Softbox - https://amzn.to/49BFgJn 
• Mic: DJI Mic Mini - https://amzn.to/48xp7ni 

✨ Some links may be Amazon affiliate links. If you shop through them, I truly appreciate your support!

📸 Follow me on IG:  Pieri_CR

💌 For all business inquiries please contact me at: pierina.beauty@gmail.com
